required_preferences.fact: Temporarily stops attending all yoga classes, focusing solely on prescribed physical therapy due to shoulder restrictions

supersedes.fact: Only attends gentle or chair-based yoga classes — avoids any yoga with weight-bearing poses on knees

required_preferences.fact: Shifts grocery shopping to weekday afternoons (Wednesday or Friday), coordinating trips with after-school pickups and grandchildren’s needs — no longer sticks strictly to Tuesday mornings

supersedes.fact: Does grocery shopping on Tuesday mornings only, avoiding weekends and peak hours

required_preferences.fact: Babysits her grandchildren at her daughter’s home only — never at her own home to avoid childproofing
Reads to her grandchildren before bedtime every night while staying at their home — chooses their favorite storybooks over her usual hardcover reading routine
Organizes virtual tax advisory sessions for local seniors using video chat — avoids phone consultations, preferring visual interaction
Attends local chamber music concerts monthly — never goes to large stadium shows

persona: A retired finance professor who volunteers as a tax advisor
